summary: The "permit" approval flow for both [ERC-20](./eip-20.md) and [ERC-721](./eip-721.md) are large improvements for the existing UX of the token underlying each ERC. This ERC extends the "permit" pattern to [ERC-1155](./eip-20.md) tokens, borrowing heavily upon both [ERC-4494](./eip-4494.md) and [ERC-2612](./eip-2612.md). The structure of [ERC-1155](./eip-1155.md) tokens requires a new ERC to account for the token standard's use of both token IDs and balances (also why this ERC requires [ERC-5216](./eip-5216.md)).
title: ERC-1155 Permit Approvals
